ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 3, 2009, is admitted to probate. Frederic A. Campagnoli is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Continued To Feb-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt, Esq., via Zoom, for Frederic Campagnoli, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the issues described in the Examiner's notes. The court confirms with counsel that he will need to submit an ex parte application to dispense with notice to heirs whose whereabouts are unknown and to provide notice with remote appearances attached.

The subject matter is continued to Feb-21-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.
